prov:entity.attribute:history: 2019-07-21T06:29:30Z ; CMOR rewrote data to be consistent with CMIP6, CF-1.7 CMIP-6.2 and CF standards.

prov:entity.attribute:references: MPI-ESM: Mauritsen, T. et al. (2019), Developments in the MPI‐M Earth System Model version 1.2 (MPI‐ESM1.2) and Its Response to Increasing CO2, J. Adv. Model. Earth Syst.,11, 998-1038, doi:10.1029/2018MS001400, Mueller, W.A. et al. (2018): A high‐resolution version of the Max Planck Institute Earth System Model MPI‐ESM1.2‐HR. J. Adv. Model. EarthSyst.,10,1383–1413, doi:10.1029/2017MS001217
prov:entity.attribute:source: MPI-ESM1.2-HR (2017): aerosol: none, prescribed MACv2-SP atmos: ECHAM6.3 (spectral T127; 384 x 192 longitude/latitude; 95 levels; top level 0.01 hPa) atmosChem: none land: JSBACH3.20 landIce: none/prescribed ocean: MPIOM1.63 (tripolar TP04, approximately 0.4deg; 802 x 404 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top grid cell 0-12 m) ocnBgchem: HAMOCC6 seaIce: unnamed (thermodynamic (Semtner zero-layer) dynamic (Hibler 79) sea ice model)
prov:entity.attribute:title: MPI-ESM1-2-HR output prepared for CMIP6

prov:entity.attribute:source: MPI-ESM1.2-HR (2017): aerosol: none, prescribed MACv2-SP atmos: ECHAM6.3 (spectral T127; 384 x 192 longitude/latitude; 95 levels; top level 0.01 hPa) atmosChem: none land: JSBACH3.20 landIce: none/prescribed ocean: MPIOM1.63 (tripolar TP04, approximately 0.4deg; 802 x 404 longitude/latitude; 40 levels; top grid cell 0-12 m) ocnBgchem: HAMOCC6 seaIce: unnamed (thermodynamic (Semtner zero-layer) dynamic (Hibler 79) sea ice model)
prov:entity.attribute:title: MPI-ESM1-2-HR output prepared for CMIP6

prov:entity.attribute:experiment: update of RCP8.5 based on SSP5
prov:entity.attribute:history: 2019-07-23T11:14:10Z ; CMOR rewrote data to be consistent with CMIP6, CF-1.7 CMIP-6.2 and CF standards.
